# ROJGAR.SITE
> India's Leading Portal for Latest Govt Jobs, Exam Results, and Admit Cards 2026.

## About
ROJGAR.SITE is an authoritative recruitment information portal that scrapes and verifies government job listings from multiple official sources. We provide real-time updates on competitive examinations, answer keys, syllabuses, and recruitment notifications for Indian citizens.

## Key Hubs
- [Home](https://rojgar.site/index.html): Live recruitment dashboard.
- [Latest Jobs](https://rojgar.site/jobs/latest-jobs/): Newest government notifications.
- [Exam Results](https://rojgar.site/jobs/results/): Latest verified recruitment results.
- [Admit Cards](https://rojgar.site/jobs/admit-card/): Official hall ticket downloads.
- [Disclaimer](https://rojgar.site/disclaimer.html): Legal information and verification notice.

## Data Philosophy
We prioritize deep extraction of essential job metadata:
- Important Dates (Begin, Last, Fee Payment)
- Application Fees (General, OBC, SC, ST)
- Vacancy Details (Post Name, Total Vacancies, Eligibility)
- Official Direct Links

## Automated Synchronization
The portal syncs live via a deep-scraping engine to ensure that all structured content matches official government releases exactly.
